Universities and colleges under Section 80 of the Maharashtra Public Universities Act, 2016
There is a provision for the appointment of the Presiding Officer of the Tribunal.
New vacancy for Presiding Officer at University and College Tribunal, Mumbai
The appointment of the presiding officer was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Vacant "Presiding Officer" at the "University and College Tribunal" at Bombay University, Mumbai
Shri Rajesh Narayandas S4G! 5th Retired Justice in the rank of "Officer."
The appointment is being made by it for a period of three years from the date of appointment.
Shri Rajesh Narayandas\ 7G! 5th Retired Justice Reference No. 1 to 3
The terms of service mentioned in the decision will remain in force.

The additional charge of the post of Presiding Officer at the College Tribunal is hereby terminated.
